setupInstructions.message: Run the following commands to install required testing packages:
setupInstructions.alternativeMethod: Add the PackageReference elements to your .csproj file and run 'dotnet restore'

fileReports.summary: Added basic test coverage for UnitTest1 class with constructor and method tests
recommendations: Implement meaningful logic in Test1() method
Consider adding parameters or return values to improve testability
fileReports.note: Current test class has minimal implementation and requires more context

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProducerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message production, null input handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more robust error handling in writeMessage method
Implement logging instead of Console.WriteLine for better testability
Add more detailed exception handling in Dispose method
fileReports.note: These tests provide basic coverage. Real-world Kafka testing would require more sophisticated mocking of Confluent.Kafka components.

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ConsumerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message reading, error handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more detailed logging in exception handling paths
Implement a more robust error handling strategy in readMessage()
Add optional CancellationToken support to readMessage() method
fileReports.note: Tests use Moq for mocking Kafka consumer and FluentAssertions for assertions

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive unit tests for OrderRequest model covering property initialization, status changes, enum validation, and edge cases
recommendations: Consider adding data validation attributes for productname and quantity
Implement custom validation logic for order quantities
Add XML documentation comments to clarify model constraints
keyImprovements: Validated default and custom object creation scenarios
Tested edge cases like null and negative values
fileReports.note: Tests do not validate business logic, only model structure and basic behavior

fileReports.summary: Added comprehensive test coverage for OrderController, testing valid and invalid scenarios, serialization, constructor initialization, and null input handling
recommendations: Add logging to capture serialization and message production details
Consider adding more robust error handling in PostAsync method
Implement input validation for OrderRequest properties
keyImprovements: Tested happy path and error scenarios
fileReports.note: Ensure ProducerWrapper and OrderRequest models are properly defined in the project
